description: Returns details for a specific Connector SDK package.

parameters.name: package_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Connector SDK package.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Connector SDK package.

connection_id.description: The connection identifier associated with this package. Each package can only be associated with one connection at a time. Returns null if the package is not yet associated with any connection.

created_by.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the package.

last_updated_by.description: The unique identifier of the user who last updated the package.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the package was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the package was last updated.

file_sha256_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the uploaded package file. Used for integrity verification and change detection.
